# Neuropolis N

## Description
A text jockey (TJ) that endlessly samples a collection of collected texts line by
line and mixes them into a never-ending stream of colour-cycling text in the
browser. The concept was made up by ax710 somewhere in the 1990s; this web
implementation was an idea by y-a-v-a.

## Creators
- ax710 (https://www.ax710.org/)
- alweervincent (https://www.alweervincent.nl/) also known as Vincent Bruijn

## Date
2010

https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/3.0/nl/

## Related
"God is a TJ", the same text jockey sampling the King James Bible
http://www.god-is-a-tj.com/

## Attribution Required
When referencing this work, please credit ax710 & alweervincent and include the
Creative Commons license.
